batch.jobdefinition.ekssecret.CfnAbout: Specifies the configuration of a Kubernetes `secret` volume. For more information, see [secret](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes/

batch.jobdefinition.ekssecret.Optional.Description: Specifies whether the secret or the secret's keys must be defined.

batch.jobdefinition.ekssecret.SecretName.Description: The name of the secret. The name must be allowed as a DNS subdomain name. For more information, see [DNS subdomain names](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#dns-subdomain-names) in the *Kubernetes documentation*.
